MOTION For A Determination Of An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS MOTION For A Determination Of An Award Of Attorney's Fees And Costs:
APPEAR: Zachary Katznelson, Esq. 457-9144 for pltfs & moving parties; Michael J. Williams, Deputy Atty General 916/323-7163 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO APPROVE FEES GRANTED EXCEPT THAT COURT WILL APPROVE MAXIMUM FEES OF $380.00 PER HOUR FOR ATTORNEY TIME AND $125.00 PER HOUR FOR PARALEGAL. PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER $1,890.00 IN COSTS AND $200,674.00 IN FEES. COURT AWARDS 1.5 MULTIPLIER). Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Entry Of Order Granting Pltfs' Mtn For Summ Judgment & Permanent Injunction & Entering Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Donald Specter, Esq. & Zachary Katznelson, Esq. 457-9144 for pltfs & moving parties; Gregory T. Fayard, Deputy Atty General 619/327-7858 & Judi Lemos, Deputy Atty General 916/445-9024 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted the State's recommendation as to the timeline for certification of the different facilities except that in the case of the Donovan and Solano facilites, if the state cannot provide adequate treatment in those facilities, the state shall transfer the patients to another facility where they could receive substantially equivalent treatment. Pltf to prepare order approved as to form to be presented to the judge at the exparte hearing (jv). (AJR/PB)
